acquisition method: Data was acquired in data dependent acquisition (DDA) mode
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide (Sigma) in the dark for 45 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: subjected to digestion with trypsin (Promega; Madison, WI, USA) overnight at 37°C
instrument: coupled online through a nanoESI emitter to a quadrupole orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q Exactive Plus, Thermo Scientific)
ionization type: coupled online through a nanoESI emitter
